info.title: RevoEngine Platform API
info.description:
Official documentation of RevoEngine Platform API
Build: 67df453bb5b0f9b2894535729c66632b73a015a6

bearer.description: Bearer token with Platform JWT token or API Key.

name.description: You can to provide name of the user.

surname.description: You can to provide surname of the user.

phone.description: You can to provide phone number of the user (must be valid), it should include region e.g. +48...

code.description: You must provide code when phone or mail provided.

name.description: You need to provide name of the user.

type.description: You need to provide type of whitelist IP,IP_SUBNET,RANGE.

name.description: You need to provide name of the user.

restricted.description: You can provide if key should be whitelisted.

whitelist.description: In case when restricted, this should be filled also.

name.description: You need to provide name of the user.

restricted.description: You can provide if key should be whitelisted.

whitelist.description: In case when restricted, this should be filled also.

name.description: You need to provide name of the user.

surname.description: You can provide surname of the user.

phone.description: You can provide phone number of the user (must be valid), it should include region e.g. +48...

name.description: You need to provide name of the user.

mail.description: You can provide mail of external service account.

ownerId.description: You can provide owner of the group, required if ownerType is assigned.

name.description: You can to provide name of the user.

surname.description: You can to provide surname of the user.

mail.description: Corporate email of the user (must be valid).

phone.description: You can to provide phone number of the user (must be valid), it should include region e.g. +48...

ownerId.description: You can provide owner of the group, required if ownerType is assigned.

name.description: Name.

componentVersion.description: Component version, if left empty it will use latest component version).

timeout.description: Timeout after which the execution will result in timeout (default: 10 minutes).

componentSchemaId.description: Validate data input with schema component.

componentSchemaElement.description: Schema component element to validate data input with.

componentSchemaVersion.description: Schema component version, if left empty it will use latest schema component version if specified).

name.description: Name.

componentVersion.description: Component version, if left empty it will use latest component version).

timeout.description: Timeout after which the execution will result in timeout.

componentSchemaId.description: Validate data input with schema component.

componentSchemaElement.description: Schema component element to validate data input with.

componentSchemaVersion.description: Schema component version, if left empty it will use latest schema component version if specified).

componentId.description: componentId optionally used for existing components

name.description: Name is only used for the presentation.

type.description: Type of component must be one of: CODE_JS,CODE_TS,CODE_JS_LIB,CODE_TS_LIB,JSON_VALIDATOR,CUSTOM_NODEJS.

async.description: Wait for custom component to be deployed.

name.description: Name is only used for the presentation.

desc.description: Representation description e.g. swagger spec details.

order.description: Order of the element (must be unique).

name.description: Name.
Label is only used for the presentation.

category.description: Category is only used for the presentation.

name.description: Label is only used for the presentation.

category.description: Category is only used for the presentation.

ownerId.description: You must provide owner of the group.

name.description: Label is only used for the presentation.

category.description: Category is only used for the presentation.

ownerId.description: You must provide owner of the group.

reference.description: You need to specify reference type [SMALLINT,INTEGER,BIGINT,REAL,DOUBLE PRECISION,NUMERIC,JSON,JSONB,TEXT,UUID,DATE,TIME,TIMETZ,TIMESTAMP,TIMESTAMPTZ,BOOLEAN].

onUpdate.description: You need to specify what happen on update of referenced table data, "none" will raise an error if there are records existing in this table that reference it.

onDelete.description: You need to specify what happen on update of referenced table data, "none" will raise an error if there are records existing in this table that reference it.

databaseDefinitionId.description: Column id, required only for update.

name.description: Name.

isPrimaryKey.description: Provide if this column is primary key.

isArray.description: Provide if this column is array of provided type, primary keys cannot be arrays.

isUnique.description: Provide if this column should contain only unique values for entire table.

isNullable.description: Provide if this column should can contain NULL values or not.

isIndex.description: Provide if this column should should be index.

foreignReferences.description: Foreign references to other database definitions.

key.description: Column name to use as partition key. Must match one of the column names in definition.

isDefault.description: Mark if this partition is default.

values.description: For LIST partitioning: array of values. For RANGE partitioning: not used.

from.description: For RANGE partitioning: starting value (use "MINVALUE" for unbounded start).

to.description: For RANGE partitioning: ending value (use "MAXVALUE" for unbounded end).

modulus.description:
The modulus value for a HASH partition. 
      Required only when the partition type is HASH. 
      It represents the total number of hash partitions. 
      The remainder value (0 to modulus - 1) determines which partition a row belongs to.

remainder.description:
The remainder value for a HASH partition. 
      Required only when the partition type is HASH. 
      This value must be between 0 and (modulus - 1). 
      Determines which partition a row will belong to within the hash partitions.

name.description: Name.

restricted.description: Provide if access should be restricted.

groups.description: Provide which groups should have access to it, once restricted is true.
